mapper.select: select id, user_id, title, content, create_time from discuss_post order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into discuss_post (user_id, title, content, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, user_id, title, content, create_time, comment_count from discuss_post where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update discuss_post set comment_count = #{commentCount} where id = #{id}
